summary: Completed comprehensive testing of PLB Logistique tracking system, zone-based pricing, weight surcharge, and financial management features. All 19 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing verified all features working correctly.
passed_tests: Homepage tracking search - PLB-2026-000001 returns correct result with status, zones, dates
Homepage tracking - invalid number shows error message
Delivery request form shows zones with prices in dropdown (Cotonou Centre - 1,500 FCFA, Akpakpa - 2,000 FCFA, etc.)
Delivery request form calculates estimated price based on zone selection
Weight surcharge applied when weight > 5kg (+500 FCFA)
Tracking number displayed after delivery creation (PLB-2026-XXXXXX format)
Admin Settings tab - zones management table visible with all zones
Admin Settings tab - weight settings visible (5kg threshold, 500 FCFA surcharge)
Admin Settings tab - commission settings visible (15% percentage)
Admin Financial tab - shows revenue (Chiffre d'affaires)
Admin Financial tab - shows rider payments (Paiements livreurs)
Admin Financial tab - shows net margin (Marge nette)
Admin Financial tab - date filter available
Public zones API returns active zones with pricing
Tracking API returns correct delivery info
Delivery creation API generates tracking number and calculates pricing
seed_data_creation: Test deliveries created with tracking numbers PLB-2026-000003, PLB-2026-000004, PLB-2026-000005 during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Zone-based pricing system fully functional. Default zones: Cotonou Centre (1500 FCFA), Akpakpa (2000 FCFA), Calavi (2500 FCFA), Godomey (2500 FCFA), Porto-Novo (3500 FCFA), Périphérie (3000 FCFA), Hors Zone (5000 FCFA). Weight surcharge: +500 FCFA for packages > 5kg. Commission: 15% of total price. Tracking numbers follow format PLB-YYYY-XXXXXX.

tracking_system.success_page_display: Working - shows tracking number with copy button

zone_pricing.zones_endpoint: GET /api/zones - returns active zones with prices
zone_pricing.delivery_form_dropdown: Shows zone name with price (e.g., 'Akpakpa - 2,000 FCFA')

weight_surcharge.display: Shows breakdown in estimated price (Zone + Supplément poids)

admin_settings.zones_management: Full CRUD - create, edit, delete zones
